цЬАч╡ВчЪДуБкцМЗцСШуБпуАБV4уБоs3уГТуГ│уГИуБл`nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`уБи`HttpErrorHandler`уБМф╕Нш╢│уБЧуБжуБДуВЛуБУуБиуБауБСуБауАВs1уГТуГ│уГИуБлуБп`nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler`уБМшиШш╝ЙуБХуВМуБжуБДуВЛуБМуАБуБУуВМуБпчХ░уБкуВЛуВпуГйуВ╣уБоуВИуБЖуБауАВхЕиф╜УчЪДуБлчЯешнШуГХуВбуВдуГлуБпхМЕцЛмчЪДуБзцнгчв║уБауБишиАуБИуВЛуАВ the actual XML configuration class is `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`. This discrepancy (different package) exists in the source too. The knowledge file correctly has `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler` in s1 hints (matching the class name declaration at the top of the document), but doesn't have `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler` in s1 or s3 hints. This seems like a gap.

Actually, looking at this again - the class name at the top of the source says `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler` but the XML uses `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`. This is contradictory in the source. The knowledge file reflects this inconsistency but neither version is in s3 hints. Since users would likely search for the XML configuration variant, I should add `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler` to s3 hints and flag this as a minor V4 finding.

findings.description: Section s3 hints are missing `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`, which is the class name used in both XML configuration code examples in that section. Users asking about configuring HttpErrorHandler may search by this fully-qualified class name.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML examples use `class="nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler"` in both the defaultPages and writeFailureLogPattern configuration snippets.

content.text:
**Summary**: The knowledge file is accurate and comprehensive with one minor finding.

- **V1 (Omission)**: Clean тАФ all substantive content is preserved including the full exception handling table, default page mappings, processing flow, and configuration properties.
- **V2 (Fabrication)**: Clean тАФ all statements trace back to the source.
- **V3 (Section Issues)**: Clean тАФ 3 source h2 sections map to s1/s2/s3 correctly; all sections have adequate content.
- **V4 (Hints)**: One minor gap тАФ s3 hints are missing `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`, the class name used in the XML config examples. (Note: there is a discrepancy within the source itself тАФ the header declares `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler` while the XML uses `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`; both are faithfully preserved in the knowledge file, but only the former appears in hints.)
- **V5 (no_knowledge_content)**: N/A тАФ set to `false`.

result:

(Note: there is a discrepancy within the source itself тАФ the header declares `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler` while the XML uses `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`; both are faithfully preserved in the knowledge file, but only the former appears in hints.)
- **V5 (no_knowledge_content)**: N/A тАФ set to `false`.
